rationale: The cited paper is an editorial content-coding assessment of JMR’s topic/method diversity, whereas the citing paper’s substantive contribution is about photo-text similarity, processing ease, and review helpfulness using Yelp data and experiments; the notes show no direct theoretical or methodological dependence on that editorial. The matched evidence is only a single DOI hit with no citation-context text, which is more consistent with an incidental background/journal-context mention.
